segments.text: Trading and launching to fair! Wow, that's nice!
segments.original_text: 切り交わして空への落とし空前まで うおーうまい

segments.text: Using that all the way— how about this rolling move? In this desperate situation, one stock is everything!
segments.original_text: 冬まで使ってこれはどうだ打ち転がり 窮地に一勝すぎる

segments.text: Crown strike with power— just barely whiffs! Once again, this situation!
segments.original_text: 王冠でぶん殴って ギリギリ当たらないまたしてもこの展開

full_text: Trading and launching to fair! Wow, that's nice! Using that all the way— how about this rolling move? In this desperate situation, one stock is everything! Crown strike with power— just barely whiffs! Once again, this situation!
